themes.label: Faith/Belief
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes trust, belief, confidence, or steadfast reliance on God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Personal testimony becomes corporate exhortation: 'Let Israel hope in the LORD from hencefort...". Cross references echo "Hope".

2: Surely I have behaved and quieted myself, as a child...

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 2 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: How does the weaned child imagery illustrate mature trust versus immature demanding?

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 2 historical
